ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defenseman) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of professional experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home arena */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the player is on the roster for */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player within the team (e.g., captain, assistant captain) */,
  "acquired_date" TEXT /* Date the player was acquired by the team */,
  "acquired_type" TEXT /* Type of acquisition (e.g., draft, trade, free agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, exhibition) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes for the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the statistics are for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes for the player */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power-play goals scored by the player */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals scored by the player */,
  "game_winning_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game-winning goals scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount for the player */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus amount */,
  "no_trade_clause" INTEGER /* Whether the contract has a no-trade clause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., upper body, lower body) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension occurred */,
  "suspension_length" INTEGER /* Length of the suspension in games */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "suspension_type" TEXT /* Type of suspension (e.g., game misconduct, match penalty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, penalty, hit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "logged_by" TEXT /* User who logged the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
